title: linochilus cinerascens
intro: Linochilus cinerascens, also known as the Smoky or Smokewort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linochilus cinerascens include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Linochilus cinerascens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine.
